title: Lou Sang UI Panel And Icon Backfill
notes: This batch backfills the first real chapter's shared UI-facing assets without touching gameplay or content flow. All replacements stay chapter-local and route only through the shared asset registry. / 这一批次用于回填第一真实章节的 UI 相关资源，不改 gameplay 或内容流程。所有替换都保持在章节局部范围内，并且只通过共享 asset registry 生效。

rollback.notes: Drop the chapter-01 override to return to the shared dialogue panel style. / 删除 chapter-01 的 override 即可回退到共享对话框样式。

verification.notes: Dialogue frame replacement must not break NPC interaction, shop opening, battle return, or save/load visibility paths. / 对话框替换不能破坏 NPC 交互、商店打开、战斗返回和存档读档的可见路径。

replacementEntries.notes: Locks the chapter-local dialogue frame, pointer spacing, and padding contract for Lou Sang. / 锁定楼桑章节的对话框边框、指针间距与 padding 规范。

rollback.notes: Drop the chapter-01 menu override to revert to the shared menu panel style. / 删除 chapter-01 的菜单 override 即可回退到共享菜单面板样式。

verification.notes: Menu frame replacement must keep save/load, gold, and status visibility stable. / 菜单框替换后应继续稳定显示存档、金钱和状态信息。

replacementEntries.notes: Locks the first chapter's menu border and selected-state frame style. / 锁定第一章菜单边框和选中态框体风格。

rollback.notes: Drop the chapter-01 shop override to revert to the shared shop panel style. / 删除 chapter-01 的商店 override 即可回退到共享商店面板样式。

verification.notes: Shop frame replacement must preserve overlay open and close behavior. / 商店框替换后应保持 overlay 的打开和关闭行为。

replacementEntries.notes: Locks the shop panel border and readable item-list spacing for Lou Sang. / 锁定楼桑商店面板边框和商品列表的可读间距。

rollback.notes: Drop the chapter-01 battle override to revert to the shared battle panel style. / 删除 chapter-01 的战斗 override 即可回退到共享战斗面板样式。

verification.notes: Battle panel replacement must preserve battle entry and return to world. / 战斗面板替换后应保持战斗进入和返回世界流程。

replacementEntries.notes: Locks the chapter-local battle frame without claiming full battle command parity. / 锁定章节局部战斗框体，但不宣称完整战斗指令一致性。

rollback.notes: Drop the chapter-local pointer override to revert to the shared icon glyph. / 删除章节局部指针 override 即可回退到共享图标字形。

verification.notes: Pointer replacement must not break dialogue prompt visibility. / 指针替换后不能破坏对话提示的可见性。

replacementEntries.notes: Locks the chapter-local dialogue pointer glyph. / 锁定章节局部对话指针样式。

rollback.notes: Drop the chapter-local menu cursor override to revert to the shared icon glyph. / 删除章节局部菜单光标 override 即可回退到共享图标字形。

verification.notes: Menu cursor replacement must keep menu navigation readable. / 菜单光标替换后应保持菜单导航可读。

replacementEntries.notes: Locks the menu cursor glyph used by the first chapter overlay styling. / 锁定第一章菜单 overlay 使用的光标样式。

rollback.notes: Drop the chapter-local shop pointer override to revert to the shared icon glyph. / 删除章节局部商店指针 override 即可回退到共享图标字形。

verification.notes: Shop pointer replacement must preserve the shop overlay hint path. / 商店指针替换后应继续保持商店 overlay 提示路径。

replacementEntries.notes: Locks the chapter-local shop pointer glyph. / 锁定章节局部商店指针样式。

rollback.notes: Drop the chapter-local battle cursor override to revert to the shared icon glyph. / 删除章节局部战斗光标 override 即可回退到共享图标字形。

verification.notes: Battle cursor replacement must preserve battle panel readability. / 战斗光标替换后应保持战斗面板可读性。

replacementEntries.notes: Locks the chapter-local battle cursor glyph. / 锁定章节局部战斗光标样式。

rollback.notes: Drop the chapter-local item icon override to revert to the shared glyph. / 删除章节局部物品图标 override 即可回退到共享字形。

verification.notes: Item icon replacement must not break chest reward handling. / 物品图标替换后不能影响宝箱奖励处理。

replacementEntries.notes: Locks the chapter-local basic item icon. / 锁定章节局部基础物品图标。

rollback.notes: Drop the chapter-local save icon override to revert to the shared glyph. / 删除章节局部存档图标 override 即可回退到共享字形。

verification.notes: Save icon replacement must not affect the existing save/load path. / 存档图标替换后不能影响现有存档读档路径。

replacementEntries.notes: Locks the chapter-local save icon used by the system page. / 锁定系统页使用的章节局部存档图标。
